column2: p1 <- ggplot(metrics, aes(x = group, y = REC, fill = group)) +
labs(x = "Categorical Group", y = "Holistic Recognition Recall (REC)", title="Base Memory Capability Mapping")
summarise(mean_p = mean(p_similar, na.rm=TRUE), se_p = sd(p_similar, na.rm=TRUE)/sqrt(n()), .groups="drop")
p2 <- ggplot(lure_bin_summary, aes(x = factor(lure_bin), y = mean_p, colour = group, group = group)) +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_p - se_p, ymax = mean_p + se_p), width = 0.15) +
labs(x = "Sequential Lure Classification Bin", y = "P('Similar'|Lure)", title="Lure Differentiation Scale")
